English(en): Fight battles and earn common rewards.

Korean(ko): 강력한 적과 전투하고 높은 보상을 획득합니다.
English(en): Fight strong enemies to earn greater rewards.
Can be exchanged for items at the shop.
Metal shards for permanently enhancing gear.

Korean(ko): 습득한 기술의 성능을 업그레이드 할 수 있습니다.
English(en): Use to enhance the power of obtained techniques.
Take in something that will corrupt you…
